# Regex fixtures for methodology hint: jira-branch-convention
# The trigger matches a lowercased Jira-ID-shaped token: <letters/digits>-<digits>.
# Runtime emission is ALSO gated on the Atlassian plugin (not visible here — this test
# only exercises the regex). ID-like tokens such as utf-8 / sha-256 DO match the regex by
# design; the Atlassian plugin-gate suppresses them for non-Jira repos, so they are not
# listed as NO_MATCH (that would contradict the regex).

MATCH: work on PROJ-123
MATCH: let's start ABC-4567 today
MATCH: implement the fix for proj-1
MATCH: PROJ-123: add the new endpoint

NO_MATCH: fix the login bug
NO_MATCH: update the readme
NO_MATCH: PROJ123 needs attention
NO_MATCH: ship the release
